codeReview.summary: The commit adds helper tests and unrelated route-copy/shared-state files, but it does not implement the sidebar extraction required by the feature contract. Sidebar state/actions remain in +page.svelte, and the file is unchanged in size versus the parent commit.

issues.description: Feature contract requires moving sidebar state/derived values/functions out of +page.svelte into WorkspaceSidebar, but +page.svelte still owns core sidebar state and behavior (e.g., selectedChannelId/selectedVideoId filters and sidebar action handlers), indicating extraction is incomplete for this feature run.

This sidebar feature commit includes unrelated tour-copy changes (chat/download-queue/highlights), which increases regression/traceability risk for a feature intended to focus on workspace sidebar extraction.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The svelte-frontend-worker procedure does not clearly define what to do when a feature is already implemented before the worker session starts, which led to a verification-only run being marked complete for an implementation feature.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback suggested updating RED guidance for pre-implemented features; commit fe47323 did not change +page.svelte or WorkspaceSidebar.svelte.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared guidance does not explicitly enforce narrow, feature-scoped commits, allowing unrelated edits to be bundled with feature work.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: git show --stat fe47323 includes sidebar test additions plus unrelated route tour-copy edits and .factory infrastructure/library files.

sharedStateObservations.observation: There is an expectation mismatch between feature acceptance criteria and documented architecture state for workspace page size/extraction completeness.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Feature expectedBehavior requires '+page.svelte is measurably shorter after extraction', while .factory/library/architecture.md still documents main +page.svelte as '~2200 lines' with inline workspace logic.

summary: Fail: required sidebar extraction criteria were not satisfied by commit fe47323; the commit primarily adds helper tests and unrelated edits while core sidebar state/logic remains in +page.svelte.
